name: Next.js + Prisma (App Router)
description: Full-stack Next.js 14 with Prisma ORM, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui
conventions: Use TypeScript for all files — no plain .js or .jsx
Use Next.js 14 App Router (app/ directory) — not the Pages Router
Server Components are the default — add 'use client' only when you need interactivity or browser APIs
API endpoints go in app/api/ as Route Handlers using NextRequest/NextResponse
Use Prisma for all database access — never write raw SQL queries
Database schema lives in prisma/schema.prisma — always run `prisma generate` after changes
Run `prisma migrate dev` for local migrations and `prisma migrate deploy` in CI/CD
Use Zod for all input validation — especially API route request bodies and form inputs
Use shadcn/ui components as the base UI library — don't write custom primitives that shadcn already provides
Tailwind CSS for all styling — no CSS modules, styled-components, or inline style objects
Environment variables: NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix for client-accessible vars, no prefix for server-only
Error boundaries at the layout level — never swallow errors silently
Use next/image for all images — never raw tags
Data fetching in Server Components using async/await directly — no useEffect for initial data
Loading states use the loading.tsx file convention, not manual loading state management
